name: sla-monitoring
description: Disputes over Service Level Agreement violations: uptime, latency, response time, availability

rules.name: SLA Uptime Breach
rules.description: Service uptime fell below the agreed SLA threshold during the monitoring period

rules.name: SLA Latency Violation
rules.description: Response latency exceeded the maximum agreed threshold

rules.name: Partial Service Degradation
rules.condition: actual_uptime < required_uptime AND actual_uptime >= degraded_threshold AND monitoring_period_confirmed == true
rules.description: Service experienced partial degradation but did not fully breach SLA

rules.name: Incidents Within Acceptable SLA
rules.description: Recorded incidents occurred but uptime remained within agreed SLA bounds

rules.name: Insufficient Monitoring Data
rules.description: Monitoring data is insufficient to determine if SLA was breached
